titleStmt.title: SII 23.309: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 309. (A.R. No. 309 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the west wall of the first prākāra Kōnērinmaikoṇḍān: year 21

summary.p: This belongs also very probably to Kulōttuṅga Chōḷa III to judge by the names of signatories at the end. It is dated in the 180th day of the year, and seems to register the royal order converting into tax free dēvadāna, some lands at Rājarājanallūr in Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu which were till then being enjoyed only as tirunāmattukkāṇi by the temple and as maḍappuṟa-iṟaiyili by a maṭha by name Rājagambhīraṉ-maḍam at Ulagamuḻuduḍai-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kulōttuṅgaśoḻavaḷanāḍu. Of the 4(1/2) vēli and odd of land thus converted 3 vēli and odd was assigned to the temple, 1 vēli to Āḷuḍaiya-Nambi for worship and the balance (a mā and odd) to Āḷuḍaiya-Piḷḷaiyār as archanā bhōga.

Besides these some other lands are also mentioned as being converted into dēvadāna-iṟaiyili, and these are stated to be situated in Irumarabundūya-Perumāḷchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The exact nature of the connection between these two sets of lands and the transaction is not clear because of some lacunae in each of the first few lines.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉac cakkaravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyak koṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyiṟ patipātamulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyat tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmāhe śvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañ ceyvāṉukkum Iṉṉāṭṭu Irumarapuntūyaperumāḷc caruppetimaṅkalattoṭum putuvūrā
ṉotaccaruppetimaṅkalattuniṉṟum kūṭiṉa nilattu Ittevar tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy māṟikkūṭiṉa nilam nāle muṉṟumākkāṇi Araik kāṇikkiḻ mummāvaraikkum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭut tiru vaḻuntūrnāṭṭu Irumarapuntūyaperumāḷc caruppetimaṅkalattoṭum maruttuvakkuṭiyil niṉṟuṅkū
ṭuttu Ittevar tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy māṟikkūṭṭiṉa nilam Oṉṟe Orumāvaraikkum vikkiramacoḻaṉ pūcaṅkuṭiyilniṉṟum kūṭiṉa nilat tukku Ikkoyil Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyārkku Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyili yāṉa nilattu māṟikkūṭṭiṉa nilam Oṉṟemukkāle Orumā mukkāṇik kiḻ Oṉpatumā
Āḷuṭaiyanampikku Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattu māṟik kūṭṭiṉa nilam mukkāle Orumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ muntirikaik kiḻaraiye Orumāvukkum paṟṟuk kokkak kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷa nāṭṭuk kaṇavatiakaram Ulakamuḻutuṭaiccaruppetimaṅkalattu rāja gampirar maṭattukku Arumoḻi tevavaḷanāṭ
ṭu rājarājanallūril maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka nilam Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilam nālaraiye muṉṟumāviṉkiḻ Eṭṭu mā mukkāṇiyum maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyili māṟi In nilattile It tevarkku muṉṟe nālumā nilam tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākavum Āḷuṭaiya nampikku veli nilamum Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyārkku paṟṟu
kku Okka Iṭaveṇṭum nilattukku Uṭalāka Oṉpatumāviṉ kiḻ Eṭṭu mā mukkāṇi nilamum Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyiliyākavum Iṭakkaṭava tākac colli Ippaṭi kaṇakkilum Iṭṭukkoḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka variyilārkkum varikkukkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉom Innilam Irupattoṉṟāvatumutal Ippaṭi
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyum Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyiliyumākak kaikkoḷḷap paṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai neṟiyuṭaiccoḻa muventa veḷāṉ Ivai cetiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 2 10 1 ḷ [100 8 10] svastiśrī .
Digital edition of SII 23.309 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
